title: foundation — HTTP routes
description: Three route groups. Central-public serves the platform-wide health + ping surface (no auth, minimal information disclosure). Platform-admin exposes module registry inspection + detailed health + search-index management. Workspace hosts get the same public ping/health so workspace-side load balancers can probe them.

groups.description: Public health probes reachable on every host. Load balancers + Kubernetes liveness/readiness probes hit these. Never leak internal state — the /api/health endpoint returns aggregate status only; detailed probe output lives on platform-admin.

routes.name: foundation.ping
routes.description: Simple liveness — the app booted and can respond. No dependencies checked. Used by fast health probes (kubelet, external monitors).

routes.name: foundation.health
routes.description: Aggregate health. Walks every registered probe from every module + returns pass/fail per probe name (no probe internals leaked). SLA target: <200ms for 95% of calls. Cached 5s to avoid stampedes.

routes.name: foundation.up
routes.description: Ultra-lightweight liveness. Plain text response. Kubernetes-style liveness probe target.

groups.description: Platform diagnostics + module registry inspection. Behind auth — leaks structural information about the deployment.

routes.name: platform.foundation.modules.index
routes.description: List every module discovered by ModuleRegistry, in dependency order. Fields per module: name, alias, priority, dependencies, contributes[].

routes.name: platform.foundation.modules.show
routes.description: Detailed module descriptor. Includes runtime health of the module's registered probes.

routes.name: platform.foundation.health.detail
routes.returns: { status, checks: [{ name, module, category, critical, status, message, duration_ms, last_success_at, last_failure_at }] }
routes.description: Detailed probe output. Includes error messages and last-success/failure timestamps. Restricted to platform admins because probe messages may leak internals.

routes.name: platform.foundation.search.reindex
routes.description: Dispatches IndexSearchableJob for every Searchable model (or the subset given). Rate-limited per platform-admin user. Async — returns immediately with job dispatch count.

routes.name: platform.foundation.search.flush
routes.description: Flushes a single model's search index. Requires reason parameter. Rare — usually only during index-schema migrations. Audited.

routes.name: platform.foundation.config.reload
routes.description: Fires ConfigReloaded event across every module. Modules with cached config drop their caches. Rare — usually part of an ops runbook after Doppler/config change.
